highlighted_studies.title: Evaluation of an Implantable Intramuscular Device to Control a Myoelectric Prosthesis
highlighted_studies.summary: Implanted intramuscular device senses muscle signals to control a myoelectric prosthesis. Device stays implanted up to 1 year. Improving control vs. surface electrodes.

highlighted_studies.title: Evaluation of a Powered Ankle Prosthesis Capable of Bidirectional Control Via Neural Recording and Cutaneous Stimulation
highlighted_studies.summary: Assesses powered ankle prosthesis with bidirectional neural recording and cutaneous stimulation. Evaluates embodiment, gait symmetry, and stability.

highlighted_studies.title: Weight-bearing Training Exercise May Improve Loading of Trans-tibial Prosthesis and Functional Gait
highlighted_studies.sponsor: University Rehabilitation Institute, Republic of Slovenia
highlighted_studies.summary: Pilot RCT using off-the-shelf devices for weight-bearing training in first-time trans-tibial prosthesis recipients.

highlighted_studies.title: A Prospective, Multicenter, Single-Arm, Open-Label Study to Evaluate the Safety and Effectiveness of the Transdermal Compress Device in Participants With Transfemoral Amputations
highlighted_studies.summary: Evaluates safety and effectiveness of transdermal compress for transfemoral amputees across 9 U.S. sites.

highlighted_studies.title: Moisture Management Liner Effectiveness Study
highlighted_studies.intervention: Moisture Management Liner + Intrasocket Cooling Element (ICE)
highlighted_studies.summary: Silicone liner that removes sweat and conducts heat using thermally conductive elastomers. Works with ICE cooling device.

highlighted_studies.title: Efficacy and Usability of the Cyberlegs++ (CLs++) Ortho-prosthesis Modules in Enabling and Enhancing Mobility in Trans-femoral Amputees
highlighted_studies.summary: Assesses efficacy of Cyberlegs++ active prosthesis for transfemoral amputees. International project in Belgium and Italy.

highlighted_studies.title: Acceptability of an Interim Socket System in the Immediate Rehabilitation of People With a tranSTibial Amputation (ASSIST)
highlighted_studies.summary: Explores acceptability of an interim socket system for new below-knee amputation patients and NHS providers.

highlighted_studies.title: Direct Skeletal Fixation of Prosthetic Limbs Following Trans-femoral Amputation - Study of an Intraosseous Transcutaneous Amputation Prosthesis (ITAP)
highlighted_studies.summary: Studies direct skeletal fixation of prosthetic limbs following trans-femoral amputation using ITAP system.

highlighted_studies.title: Characterizing Ankle Function During Sloped Locomotion for Prosthesis Development
highlighted_studies.sponsor: VA Eastern Colorado Health Care System
highlighted_studies.summary: Characterizes ankle function during sloped locomotion to develop advanced powered ankle-foot prostheses.
